"'''Whispers in the Dark'''" is a short story writen by [[Charlene Newcomb]] with illustrations by [[Mike Vilardi]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] by [[West End Games]] in [[May]] [[1994]].

==Plot summary==
On [[Garos IV]], the once small [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] has grown massive around the [[Mining center complex|mining center]] next to the capital [[Ariana]]. While monitoring [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout]] patrols around the Imperial base, the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garos underground]] realizes that one of their hidden [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] caches has been discovered. Needing every weapon they can get, [[Alexandra Winger]] devises a plan to relocate a [[PLX-1/Legends|Plex missile launcher]] that has yet to be found.

With the help of undercover [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Dair Haslip]], they test the response time of the scout patrols. The two pose as a couple seeking privacy, and wander into a restricted area of the Winger property. That night, using her new information, Alex successfully moves the missile launcher.

The next [[Standard day/Legends|day]], Haslip learns that a [[systems control unit]] will be transported with only two squads to protect it. The underground sees this as the perfect opportunity for an ambush. They use the Plex to destroy the two [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] and the convoy they were guarding. On the way back, Alex has a vision of a [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|sandy-haired, blue-eyed man]] helping her.
